list.title: BckdCanvasClass#addLayer
list.description:
Adds a new layer of images (from a subsequent Drive upload in the
same session). All layers must share the same frame count.

list.title: BckdCanvasClass#clear
list.description: Clears the background canvas.

list.title: BckdCanvasClass#draw
list.description:
Draws the image for the given layer/frame, scaling it down to fit
within canvasContainer if it's larger than the canvas in either
dimension. Updates the global {@link scale} factor used in CSV export.

list.title: BckdCanvasClass#layers
list.description: Array of per-layer image arrays.

list.title: Command#execute
list.description: Executes (or redoes) the command. Must be implemented by subclasses.

list.title: Command#undo
list.description: Undoes the command. Must be implemented by subclasses.

list.title: CommandGroup#addCommand
list.description: Adds a command to this group.

list.title: CommandGroup#commands
list.description: Commands belonging to this group, in execution order.

list.title: CommandGroup#execute
list.description: Executes every command in the group, in order.

list.title: CommandGroup#undo
list.description: Undoes every command in the group, in reverse order.

list.title: CreateShapeCommand#shape
list.description: Created lazily on first execute() so redo reuses the same shape instance.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#_selection
list.description: The currently selected shape, or null if none.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#_shapes
list.description: All shapes created in this session.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#addShape
list.description: Adds a shape to this session.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#changeSelectedShapeColor
list.description:
Applies a color change to the selected shape via a
{@link ColorChangeCommand}, if a shape is selected.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#changeSelectedShapeLabel
list.description:
Applies a label change to the selected shape via a
{@link LabelChangeCommand}, if a shape is selected.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#clear
list.description: Clears the drawing canvas.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#deSelect
list.description:
Clears the current selection and resets the contour-editor UI
(color picker, label field, pause/delete buttons) to their
no-selection state. Deactivates any provisional points on the
previously selected shape.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#deleteSelectedShape
list.description: Deletes the selected shape (via {@link ContourDeleteCommand}), if any.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#doDoubleClick
list.description:
Handles double-click on the canvas. If the select tool is active and
the double-click lands on the selected shape, shows transparent
provisional midpoint markers (via {@link Shape#setUpProvisionalPoints})
so the user can click one to insert a new point there.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#doDown
list.description:
Handles mousedown/touchstart on the canvas. Behavior depends on
{@link currentTool}:
- Select tool (0): begins a point-drag or shape-drag if the cursor is
  over a handle/shape, inserts a point if hovering a provisional
  marker, or selects/deselects a shape under the cursor.
- Pen tool (1): starts a new shape if none is selected, otherwise
  adds a point to the selected shape (closing it if clicking near its
  first point).

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#doMove
list.description:
Handles mousemove/touchmove on the canvas. If a drag is in progress,
dispatches the corresponding drag command. Otherwise, with the
select tool active and a shape selected, updates
{@link DrawCanvasClass#expectResize}/{@link DrawCanvasClass#expectInsert}
and the cursor style based on what the cursor is currently hovering
(a selection handle, a provisional point, the shape body, or nothing).

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#doUp
list.description:
Handles mouseup/touchend on the canvas: ends any in-progress drag
and command group.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#dragState
list.description:
Info about an in-progress drag, or null if the user isn't dragging.
`mode: 'body'` = dragging the whole shape; `mode: 'point'` = dragging a single selection handle.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#draw
list.description:
Redraws all shapes for the given frame. If "overlay last" is
checked, also draws the previous frame's shapes at 50% opacity as a
reference ghost.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#expectInsert
list.description: Index into the selected shape's provisional points that the cursor is hovering, or -1 if none.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#expectResize
list.description: Index of the selection handle the cursor is hovering, or -1 if none.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#getMaxNumPoints
list.description:
Returns the largest number of points any single shape has on any
single frame, across all shapes. Used to size the coordinate columns
of the exported CSV header.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#getPos
list.description:
Translates a mouse/touch event's page coordinates into coordinates
relative to the drawing canvas's top-left corner.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#pauseSelectedShape
list.description: Pauses the selected shape (via {@link FramePauseCommand}), if any.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#removeSelectedShape
list.description: Removes the currently selected shape from the session, if any, and deselects.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#selection
list.description: The currently selected shape.

list.title: DrawCanvasClass#shapes
list.description: All shapes in this session.

list.title: FramePauseCommand#startPoints
list.description: Deep copy of the shape's per-frame points before pausing.

list.title: HistoryManager#beginCommandGroup
list.description:
Begins collecting subsequent {@link HistoryManager#executeCommand}
calls into a single {@link CommandGroup} rather than separate history
entries. Call when a continuous user gesture (drag, multi-step
action) begins; pair with {@link HistoryManager#endCommandGroup}.

list.title: HistoryManager#currentCommandGroup
list.description: The command group currently being built, if grouping is active.

list.title: HistoryManager#endCommandGroup
list.description:
Ends the current command group (started via
{@link HistoryManager#beginCommandGroup}) and pushes it to history as
a single undoable unit, if it contains at least one command.

list.title: HistoryManager#executeCommand
list.description:
Executes a command immediately. If a command group is active, the
command is added to that group instead of being pushed to history on
its own; otherwise it's pushed directly and the redo stack is cleared.

list.title: HistoryManager#groupingActive
list.description: Whether commands are currently being collected into {@link HistoryManager#currentCommandGroup} instead of pushed to history individually.

list.title: HistoryManager#history
list.description: Commands executed, oldest first.

list.title: HistoryManager#maxHistorySize
list.description: Maximum number of history entries kept before the oldest is dropped.

list.title: HistoryManager#redo
list.description: Re-executes the most recently undone command/group, moving it back to history. Redraws the current frame.

list.title: HistoryManager#redoStack
list.description: Commands undone, available to redo.

list.title: HistoryManager#undo
list.description: Undoes the most recent command/group in history, moving it to the redo stack. Redraws the current frame.

list.title: Shape#_frames
list.description: Map of frame index -> array of points on that frame.

list.title: Shape#_modified
list.description: Map of frame index -> whether the shape was explicitly modified on that frame.

list.title: Shape#_provisionalPoints
list.description: Transparent midpoint markers shown when editing points; see {@link Shape#setUpProvisionalPoints}.

list.title: Shape#addPoint
list.description: Adds a point to the shape on the current and all future frames.

list.title: Shape#closed
list.description: Whether the shape is a closed polygon.

list.title: Shape#color
list.description: The shape's stroke color.

list.title: Shape#deactivateProvisionalPoints
list.description: Clears provisional points and exits point-editing mode.

list.title: Shape#deleteLastPoint
list.description: Deletes the last point of the shape from the current and all future frames.

list.title: Shape#deletePoint
list.description: Deletes the point at `idx` from the current and all future frames.

list.title: Shape#distToSegment
list.description:
Computes the shortest distance from point (px, py) to the line
segment from a to b.

list.title: Shape#draw
list.description:
Draws the shape's outline for `frameIndex` onto `ctx`, plus
selection handles and/or provisional point markers if this shape is
selected. Does nothing if the shape doesn't exist (is paused) on
`frameIndex`.

list.title: Shape#frames
list.description: Per-frame point map.

list.title: Shape#hitTest
list.description:
Tests whether (mx, my) is within `tolerance` px of any segment of
the shape on the current frame.

list.title: Shape#insertPoint
list.description:
Inserts a point — taken from the cached provisional point at
`insIdx` — immediately after index `insIdx` in the shape's point
array, on the current and all future frames.

Note: this reads `this._provisionalPoints[insIdx]` directly, so the
caller must ensure provisional points haven't been recomputed since
`insIdx` was captured (see {@link InsertPointCommand}, which inserts
and then calls {@link Shape#resetProvisionalPoints} immediately
after — but does not itself re-validate `insIdx` against the new
layout, which is the source of the stale-index issue when multiple
insertions happen without an intervening mousemove).

list.title: Shape#label
list.description: The shape's user-facing label.

list.title: Shape#pause
list.description:
Pauses the shape: sets its points to null on the current and all
future frames (so it stops being drawn/exported on those frames),
deselects it, and redraws.

list.title: Shape#provisionalPoints
list.description: Current provisional midpoint markers.

list.title: Shape#resetProvisionalPoints
list.description:
Fully recomputes provisional points from the shape's current point
layout. Call after any mutation to the shape's points (insert,
delete, drag) so stale provisional markers don't survive a change in
point indices — see the note on {@link Shape#insertPoint} for why
this alone doesn't fully eliminate stale-index issues.

list.title: Shape#setModified
list.description: Sets whether the shape was explicitly modified on the given frame.

list.title: Shape#setUpProvisionalPoints
list.description:
Computes transparent midpoint markers ("provisional points") for
each segment of the shape on the current frame that's longer than
18px, so the user has a clickable target to insert a new point into
that segment. No-op if provisional points are already active
(`editingPoints` is true) — call {@link Shape#resetProvisionalPoints}
to force a recompute instead.

list.title: Shape#unpause
list.description:
Reverses {@link Shape#pause} by restoring the shape's per-frame
points and re-selecting it.

list.title: accessToken
list.description: Cached Drive API access token, persisted in localStorage so the user isn't re-prompted every session until it expires.

list.title: bckdClass
list.description: The background-canvas controller for this session.

list.title: canvasContainer
list.description:
The canvas the user sees is actually two stacked canvases: bckdCanvas
(the background map/radar imagery) and drawCanvas (user-drawn shapes).
Both live inside the canvasContainer div. See the Canvas API docs:
https://www.w3schools.com/graphics/canvas_drawing.asp

list.title: changeFrame
list.description:
Changes the current frame: updates {@link frameIdx}, syncs the frame
slider/label, and redraws.

list.title: createImage
list.description:
Creates an `Image` object from a Google Drive file. Fetches the file
as binary data via the Drive API, converts it to a Blob, and loads
that Blob into an Image element.

list.title: createPicker
list.description: Create and render a Google Picker object for searching images.

list.title: currentTool
list.description: The drawing tool currently selected: 0 = select, 1 = pen, 2 = pan.

list.title: downloadAll
list.description:
Runs the full export pipeline: renders every frame/layer to images,
builds the shape-data CSV, and bundles both into a downloaded zip.

list.title: downloadCsv
list.description:
Builds the exported CSV of shape data. The first row is a `META`
sentinel row carrying the current {@link scale} factor (so exported
pixel coordinates can be mapped back to original image resolution).
The header row is sized dynamically to the largest layer count and
largest point count across all shapes/frames (see
{@link DrawCanvasClass#getMaxNumPoints}). One data row is written per
shape per frame on which that shape exists (i.e. isn't paused).

list.title: downloadImageFrames
list.description:
Renders every layer/frame combination (background + drawn shapes) to
a flattened PNG blob, using a temporary off-screen canvas so the
visible canvases aren't disturbed. Restores the original layer/frame
view afterward.

list.title: drawClass
list.description: The drawing-canvas controller for this session.

list.title: drawRequestedFrame
list.description:
Redraws both canvases for the current global frame/layer. Called
whenever the frame or layer changes.

list.title: editingPoints
list.description: Whether the currently selected shape is showing transparent "provisional" midpoint markers for point insertion.

list.title: frameIdx
list.description: Index of the frame currently being displayed.

list.title: gapiLoaded
list.description: Callback after api.js is loaded.

list.title: generateZipDownload
list.description:
Bundles exported PNG frames and the shape-data CSV into a single
downloaded zip file (`trax_output.zip`).

list.title: gisInited
list.description: Whether Google Identity Services has finished initializing.

list.title: gisLoaded
list.description: Callback after Google Identity Services are loaded.

list.title: half
list.description: Half of {@link mySelBoxSize}; used to center handle squares on their point coordinate.

list.title: handleAuthClick
list.description: Sign in the user upon button click.

list.title: handleSignoutClick
list.description: Sign out the user upon button click.

list.title: initCanvasFunctionality
list.description:
Sets up the canvases, canvas classes, and event listeners after the
Google Drive Picker callback (i.e. once the user has selected map
images for the first time in this session).

list.title: initializePicker
list.description:
Callback after the API client is loaded. Loads the
discovery doc to initialize the API.

list.title: layerFilenameArrays
list.description: Array of arrays of image filenames, one inner array per layer, used to label exported CSV rows.

list.title: layerIdx
list.description: Index of the map layer currently being displayed.

list.title: maybeEnableButtons
list.description: Enables user interaction after all libraries are loaded.

list.title: mySelBoxSize
list.description: Side length, in px, of the selection/provisional-point handle squares drawn on the canvas.

list.title: numFrames
list.description: Total number of frames loaded into the app.

list.title: numLayers
list.description: Total number of layers loaded into the app.

list.title: pickerCallback
list.description:
Callback once the user has picked file(s) in the Google Picker.
Converts each picked doc into an Image (via {@link createImage}),
sorts them by filename, and either initializes the canvases for the
first time this session ({@link initCanvasFunctionality}) or adds them
as a new layer ({@link BckdCanvasClass#addLayer}). If adding a layer
fails because the frame count doesn't match, reopens the picker so the
user can pick a matching set.

list.title: pickerInited
list.description: Whether the Google Picker API has finished initializing.

list.title: resizeCanvases
list.description:
Resizes both canvases to fill canvasContainer and redraws.

Currently disabled (not called) because shape coordinates don't
currently adjust when the canvas resizes, so shapes visually shift
out of place relative to the background image.

list.title: scale
list.description: Scale factor each background image was drawn at, relative to its native size. Recorded in exported CSV metadata so coordinates can be mapped back to original image pixels.

list.title: switchToDraw
list.description: Switches to the pen/draw tool (1): updates {@link currentTool}, the tool radio, and the cursor.

list.title: switchToSelect
list.description: Switches to the select tool (0): updates {@link currentTool}, the tool radio, and the cursor.

list.title: tokenClient
list.description: OAuth2 token client from Google Identity Services, initialized in {@link gisLoaded}.

list.title: trax_app.js
list.description:
trax_app — a meteorological annotation tool.
Users draw and edit shapes over a sequence of map image
frames/layers, with full undo/redo via the Command pattern, and export
the result as a CSV + zipped image bundle.

See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md for design overview and rationale. This
file's doc comments describe individual class/method
behavior. You can run `jsdoc` to generate a browsable reference.
This documentation is available at https://ecaldon.github.io/trax_app/docs/api/
